name: 发电机与交变电流
subject: physics
author: weponusa
description: 理解交流发电机的工作原理（线圈在磁场中转动产生交变电流），掌握交变电流的特点（正弦波形、周期、频率），了解有效值与峰值的关系，了解高压输电的意义。
description_en: Understand AC generator working principle, alternating current characteristics (sine wave, period, frequency), effective value vs peak value, and high-voltage power transmission.
